# CWE-367 vulnerable — Time-of-check Time-of-use (TOCTOU) Race Condition
lang: go
file: CWE-367-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

func LoadKYCScan(c *GinCtx) ([]byte, error) {
	name := c.Request.URL.Query().Get("scan")
	target := filepath.Join("/var/kyc/inbox", name)
	if _, err := os.Stat(target); os.IsNotExist(err) {
		return nil, err
	}
	return os.ReadFile(target)
}
